title: Celestial Sun & Moon Pair Art Print
description: This celestial sun and moon pair art print features a radiant golden sun with rays and celestial stars in warm tones alongside a serene silver moon with stars and midnight flowers. Crafted in an ornate vintage style with rich linework and oil painting texture, the pieces combine warm and cool hues for striking contrast. Perfect for adding cosmic charm to any space, the 4K resolution and wall art quality ensure detailed, gallery-level presentation.
notes_for_review: Verify if 'vintage celestial' aligns with existing series. Check price against bundle eligibility for two-piece sets.
_image_prompt: Two companion prints: (1) A radiant golden sun face surrounded by rays, clouds and celestial stars in warm gold and amber tones. (2) A serene silver moon face surrounded by stars, moths and midnight flowers in cool blue and silver tones. Ornate vintage celestial illustration style, rich detailed linework, oil painting texture, warm atmospheric lighting, highly detailed, wall art print quality, 4K resolution
